title: EconomicsNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-economics-server-rs (forecast request/result pipeline plus market-event fan-out). The server subscribes to forecast requests under the dd-economics-server queue group, publishes forecast results and market events, and additionally reuses PublicDataPipelineJobs and RuntimeEvents from their owning schemas. Payloads carry an economics.forecast.v1 schemaVersion envelope and must not contain secrets.

$dd:nats.summary: Economics forecast request/result pipeline and market-event fan-out.

subjects.name: EconomicsForecastRequests
subjects.description: Inbound forecast/recommendation requests consumed by the economics server. Subscribed with the dd-economics-server queue group so requests load-balance across replicas. Default for ECONOMICS_FORECAST_REQUEST_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.economics.forecast.requests

subjects.name: EconomicsForecastResults
subjects.description: Forecast and recommendation results emitted by the economics server. Carries an economics.forecast.v1 envelope. Default for ECONOMICS_FORECAST_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.economics.forecast.results

subjects.name: EconomicsMarketEvents
subjects.description: Market-event fan-out (narrative, event, and entity-level signals) published by the economics server for downstream consumers. Default for ECONOMICS_MARKET_EVENT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.economics.market.events

queueGroups.name: EconomicsServerQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group used by dd-economics-server replicas consuming forecast requests.
